# LevelScalingRow.HpScalar property

The verified `hpScalar` (col `+4`) — the multiplier on [`BaseHitpointsMax`](../LevelScalingTable/BaseHitpointsMax.md) that yields base Max Life (§8.2). `1.0` at level 1.
